title: Create: Brassworks
description: An overworld-friendly Create addon that adds balanced, renewable brass preparation and brass recycling.
body: # Create: Brassworks **Create: Brassworks** is a small Create addon focused on making brass progression smoother, more renewable, and less punishing without turning brass into a free resource. It adds a nether-free brass path for those who want to **Create**, and not spend hours trying to find a nether fortress. ## Features ### Renewable Zinc and Copper Create: Brassworks adds two new processing items: - **Zinc Grit** - **Copper Grit** These are obtained through Create washing chains: - Washing **gravel** has a chance to produce **Zinc Grit** - Washing **sand** has a chance to produce **Copper Grit** ## Brass Dust **Brass Dust** is the main item added by this mod. You can craft it using copper, zinc, and coal or charcoal, then smelt or blast it into brass ingots. Once you've progressed more, you can use a mechanical mixer with copper, zinc, and andesite alloy to produce Brass Dust more efficiently. ## Brass Recycling Brassworks adds a few salvage recipes so common brass parts can recover some value: - Crushing a **Brass Sheet** returns **Brass Dust** - Crushing an **Empty Blaze Burner** returns Brass Dust, with a chance to recover an Iron Sheet - Crushing a **Precision Mechanism** returns Brass Dust, with a chance to recover Andesite Alloy ## Requirements - **Minecraft:** 1.20.1 to 1.21.1 - **Loader:** NeoForge, Fabric, Forge, Datapack - **Create:** 6.0.10 or newer ## Author Made by **uhwebm**.
